name: Tinka Resources Ltd.
description: Tinka Resources Ltd. is a junior mineral exploration and development company focused on the acquisition and advancement of precious and base metal projects. Its flagship asset is the 100%-owned Ayawilca Zinc-Silver-Tin project, located in the Pasco region of central Peru. The company is dedicated to exploring and developing high-quality mineral deposits, leveraging its expertise in carbonate replacement deposits to unlock value. Tinka Resources is publicly traded on the TSX Venture Exchange and maintains its corporate headquarters in Vancouver, British Columbia, while operating extensively within the mining-rich landscape of Peru.
